dimension_results.raw_response:
ISSUE_1_VALIDATION_SCORE: 0 - This issue is incorrectly identified. The receipt is for accommodation (hotel) which falls under "Travel" category, not "Non-Travel". For travel expenses like hotels, the rules specifically mention "Exception where it is not possible to use the Local Experts name e.g. on flight tickets/hotels, in which case the workers name and details should be used."
